Aptio® is AMI’s secure, modular and battle-tested BIOS/UEFI firmware designed to power everything from clients and servers to IoT, embedded systems and hyperscale infrastructure. Aptio simplifies development, ensures compliance and accelerates time-to-market. Trusted by silicon giants and deployed across billions of devices, Aptio forms the foundation of a complete firmware ecosystem.

AMI’s MegaRAC® BMC firmware powers intelligent infrastructure with scalable, secure and resilient manageability solutions for data centers, edge devices and AI platforms. With broad silicon support, standards-based interfaces and advanced features such as telemetry, orchestration and secure out-of-band control, MegaRAC enables OEMs, ODMs and cloud providers to manage complex systems from the edge to the cloud with confidence.

Tektagon™ is a rock-solid platform root of trust (PRoT) delivering proactive, silicon-anchored firmware protection for today’s most targeted infrastructure layers. Engineered for resilience from the ground up, it combines real-time validation, secure boot, runtime integrity enforcement and seamless cross-platform integration. With detection, recovery and continuous verification built in, Tektagon ensures systems remain secure without compromise or performance trade-offs.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_button button_url=”@ET-DC@eyJkeW5hbWljIjp0cnVlLCJjb250ZW50IjoicG9zdF9saW5rX3VybF9wYWdlIiwic2V0dGluZ3MiOnsicG9zdF9pZCI6IjQ3MyJ9fQ==@” button_text=”Learn More” AMI’s Vulnerability Management Service (VMS) is a cloud-based platform that gives firmware developers, OEMs, and system integrators real-time visibility into open-source and proprietary components, enabling swift identification, assessment and remediation of vulnerabilities through CVE tracking and compliance-ready insights

AMI’s Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) tools offer a detailed inventory of all components—open-source, vendor-supplied and proprietary—used in firmware builds. Supporting both Aptio and MegaRAC, these solutions help ensure transparency, regulatory compliance and a stronger security posture across the entire firmware lifecycle.

excerpt.rendered: Scalable, Intelligent Firmware Solutions from the Edge to the CloudAptio® is AMI’s secure, modular and battle-tested BIOS/UEFI firmware designed to power everything from clients and servers to IoT, embedded systems and hyperscale infrastructure. Aptio simplifies development, ensures compliance and accelerates time-to-market. Trusted by silicon giants and deployed across billions of devices, Aptio forms the foundation […]
